title: Simply Wall Street Analysis of Ballard Power Systems (TSX:BLDP)
text: Simply Wall Street analysis of Ballard Power Systems as of mid-May 2026 shows market capitalization of CA$1.7 billion with share price of CA$5.68. Consensus analyst price target stands at CA$4.16, suggesting potential downside from current levels. The company trades at a premium valuation relative to fundamentals given its unprofitability. Analysts forecast earnings and revenue growth by 23.6% and 14.8% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow 28.9% annually. However, Return on equity is forecast to be -8% in 3 years, indicating the company will remain unprofitable through the forecast period. Revenue is projected at US$118.2 million for 2026, up from US$99.4 million in 2025. Despite revenue growth, the company is expected to post losses of approximately US$0.161 per share in 2026, an improvement from prior losses but still deeply negative. The company demonstrates operational progress with positive gross margins for the third straight quarter, supported by major contracts including a 500-unit engine deal with New Flyer and recent wins with Solaris Bus & Coach. Share price volatility averages 14% weekly change, and limited order book visibility despite recent contract wins presents risk.
